## Summary

What changed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bash -n install.sh`.
- [ ] I ran `git diff --check`.
- [ ] I ran `./install.sh --target all --dry-run`.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, private evidence ledgers, or private verdicts.
- [ ] New or changed seats preserve the "lens, not capability" rule.
- [ ] Roster/profile changes keep quorums small and meaningfully opposed.

## Verification

Paste the relevant command output or explain why a check was not run.
